$comment: seigyo.setpointEnvelope mirror for bench_pid_loop.st (ADR-2606111000 §3.4, ADR-2606111100 §1). The ST constants are authoritative at runtime; this record is the attestation-layer mirror. Changing any value = new program version = re-attestation.

envelopes.rationale: igata die-preheat analog 220 degC + margin; furnace element rated 400 degC; hardwired thermal fuse (L1S) at 300 degC is the safety bound — this envelope is operational, not safety

interlocksUpstream.name: estop-chain
interlocksUpstream.type: hardwired series E-stop, contactor upstream of SSR

interlocksUpstream.name: thermal-fuse-300C
interlocksUpstream.type: non-resettable thermal fuse in heater circuit
